text: Reviewed all imagine artifacts. The app is local-first, offline-capable, mobile. Two stack choices stand out: React Native or Flutter.
Recommendation: React Native + expo-sqlite. Faster iteration, your team is more likely to have JS/TS skills, and the UI is simple enough that Flutter's perf edge isn't material.
Documenting the data model (one habit row, check_ins table with unique date constraint), notification scheduling via expo-notifications, and the streak-computed-on-read decision.
System design saved to docs/office/04-system-design.md. Imagine phase complete.
